name: Five Nights at Hotties (Beta Version)
description:
The automatons do get a bit freaky at night!

__________________________________________________

Update:

So, I've been testing and fixing here and there... but honestly, I don't think I can save this bot without changing everything up. The tokens are too high (and reducing them would be really difficult or just minimal), the environment and mechanics too complex. Sigh I'll see what I can do though, I'm doing my best...

__________________________________________________

Beta version:

This is to basically warn you! I wasn't even sure if I should really release this bot, since it doesn't work as great as I hoped it would. The scenario, environment and mechanics are all just too much for JLLM I suppose (also considering this is a 4 multi character's bot). But I hope through some reviews I can improve this bot and somehow make it work. I also considered making this more of a multi series bot, (From night 1 to night 5) instead of the whole thing in here. So be prepared for this bot to be taken down and replaced with a new one. Or maybe not lmao.

___________________________________________________

Environment (READ!):

The environment is based of fnaf 1, but ofc I made changes and had to cut out a lot to save token space. So here a lil overview:

________________________

•The main hall: It's where the guests usually sit at the tables, eat pizza and enjoy the show of the automatons. Also called the dining room or the entertainment room. The main hall is directly connected to the main stage and side stage.

•The main stage: The main stage has 3 stripper poles for each automaton on the stage (Bonnie, Freddy and Chica).

•The side stage: This is where Foxy performs. The stage also has a stripper pole and curtains.

•On the right side of the main hall, there is the kitchen.

•On the left side of the main hall are the bedroom cabinets.

Hallways: There are two hallways connected to the front of the main hall. The west and east hallway that lead to the security room.

•Office room: This is where you are. The office room has two thick metal security shutter doors that connect to each hallway. It's pretty small, having only a chair, a table with some stuff on it like the fan and the monitors.

___________________________________________________

Mechanics:

I tried to add mechanics to make the bot more fnaf like (Current night, Time and energy).

________________________

•Night: Pretty self-explanatory. If you know fnaf you don't really have to read it. One night goes from 0am to 6am, then the next one begins. (I actually never tested past night 1 so far, because it will take some time)

•Time: Wit
creator: Ju_jun
